content.en:
At this moment, Ye Tian's comprehension of the Ultimate Rule Realm was extremely fast.

In an instant, countless realizations erupted, allowing his Ultimate Rule Realm to rapidly improve.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian's Ultimate Rule Realm to reach the Dacheng realm.

And at this time, his Nightmare Rama Flower had not been completely exhausted, and he began to try to create the Ultimate Arcane of the Extreme Path again.

If you can take the opportunity to create an extreme ultimate arcane, it will be worth it.

However, the Ultimate Arcane of the Extreme Path is not so easy to create, and there is simply not enough time.

But Ye Tian also took the opportunity to use a treasure similar to the Demon Ancient Mirror to speed up his perception, but this body would definitely be scrapped later.

But it's all worth it!

At the moment when the Nightmare Rama Flower was exhausted, Ye Tian finally created an ultimate arcane technique, which was above the peak ultimate arcane, but it did not reach the true extreme ultimate arcane level.

Or maybe this is a crippled Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, which can probably exert one-third of the power of the Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, but it still needs to pay a certain price.

Ye Tian named this Broken Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane the Demon Blade, once he cast this Broken Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, his body would also be injured, and he would need to suffer one-tenth of the Demon Blade's counter-injury.

Of course, he can slowly improve it later and completely eliminate the sequelae, but it will take a long time, and it will not be possible to do it in a short time.

And the Ultimate Rule Realm broke through to the Dacheng realm, coupled with the move of the Demon Blade, Ye Tian's strength now became extremely powerful.

And at this moment, his replica body had completely collapsed.

However, for him, it was just the loss of a replica body.

If his body is not injured in this era, then it will not have any effect.

"It's time to hit the top Ancient Demon level realm, once I break through, my strength will improve by leaps and bounds, in the top Ancient Demon level powerhouse realm, it is definitely a truly invincible level, maybe it won't be weaker than the average peak Ancient Demon level powerhouse! At the very least, it should not be weaker than Pleuz!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He began to attack the top Gu Demon level realm.

He could have broken through a long time ago, and now in a single thought, he began to complete the second transformation of the ultimate body under the influence of the Dacheng-level Ultimate Rule Realm.

Rumble!!!!!

The body transformed, and countless ultimate particles poured into the body, allowing him to begin his second transformation.

His aura is getting stronger and stronger, and his ultimate will and physical strength are all crossing levels.

I don't know how long it has taken for this transformation to really be completed, and Ye Tian has officially broken through to become a top ancient demon-level powerhouse.

In his time, this was the top ultimate supreme!

Moreover, he has already raised the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm to the Dacheng Realm, if he raises the Ultimate Rule Realm to the Consummation Realm again, and then raises his cultivation to the current limit, he can hit the peak Ancient Demon Level Realm.

"It would be great to get another Nightmare Rama Flower!"

Ye Tian longed.

However, this kind of treasure is too rare, and only the main department of Aro's mother can take it out at will, and he has no channel to obtain this kind of treasure.

......

Tribe of Dragons.

Ye Tian and Proz sat together, chatting, drinking, and discussing.

"God, congratulations on your breakthrough to the top Ancient Demon level. "

"Lord Proz, I'm a little curious, is there really no hope of becoming the ultimate ancient demon if it's not a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse of the three hundred and sixty-five main division?" Ye Tian asked.

Pleoz shook his head, "It's not hopeless, a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse like us, there is also a 1 in 10,000 chance of impacting the ultimate ancient demon, after countless years, maybe whoever is lucky enough to break through successfully." But once the breakthrough is successful and he becomes the ultimate ancient demon-level powerhouse, he will establish a new main department. In fact, these three hundred and sixty-five main divisions were also established step by step in this way, and some of the main divisions were very weak, just an ultimate ancient demon. "

"Where are the territories of the other main departments?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

As far as he knew, there seemed to be a void outside the Abyss of Arrow Mother's main department, except for the Huoxi Time and Space Battlefield, he had never seen other ancient demon-level powerhouses of the main department.

The Stygian Ancient Demon and other powerhouses must have known, but he had never known about it.

However, he was now interested in finding out.

"Time bubble!"

Pleoz said: "There are space-time bubbles on the endless space-time line, but we can't see these space-time bubbles, only the ultimate ancient demon-level powerhouse can get a glimpse of the space-time bubbles on the ultimate space-time line. And the ultimate ancient demon can transform the space-time bubble into an endless territory. The Abyss of Aromu is a space-time bubble that has been transformed into what it is today. The main department of the Arrow Mother is in charge of the Abyss of the Arrow, and even if other weak tribes give birth to an ultimate ancient demon-level powerhouse, they cannot threaten the status of the Arrow's Mother's main department, so they can only leave the Abyss of the Arrow's Mother and look for other space-time bubbles. "

"That's what happened!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Immediately, he asked, "Will these space-time bubbles burst?"

"Yes, but it's unlikely!" Pleoz explained, "I once participated in the preaching of an Ultimate Ancient Demon, and there was a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse who mentioned this matter, and the Ultimate Ancient Demon can only destroy all the environments inside the space-time bubble, but it can't burst the space-time bubble itself. Until now, the space-time bubble has not been broken, and I don't know what it will look like after it is broken. Perhaps only the space-time level Ultimate Ancient Demon, which is above the Ultimate Ancient Demon, can easily burst the space-time bubble. "

After that, i.e.

Pleoz also taught Ye Tian the method of leaving the Abyss of Arromu, which is not difficult, he only needs to have enough understanding of space-time particles to locate the endless space-time line outside the space-time bubble, and then he can get out of the Abyss of Arromu.

However, it is only a short escape, and if it does not reach the realm of the ultimate ancient demon, it will eventually be swallowed by the endless space-time line and turn into a part of the endless space-time line.

Plotz would go out occasionally, but would soon be back, after all, there was nothing on the infinite space-time line, and it was better to stay in the Abyss of Arromu.

Of course.

If you dare to go into the space-time bubble of other main parts, then you can also go.
